No Poverty.reason: The course content is solely focused on Korean language acquisition and cultural understanding, with no explicit or implicit connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course focuses on language and culture, with no content related to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The syllabus does not contain any elements related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare.

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level language course, it directly contributes to tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops practical language skills (Target 4.4). Learning about 'Life in Korea' and 'Humanity literacy' also aligns with appreciating cultural diversity (Target 4.7).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no information in the syllabus pertaining to water resources, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content is entirely unrelated to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Learning Korean can facilitate communication and understanding between people of different national origins, indirectly supporting social inclusion (Target 10.2) and potentially orderly migration (Target 10.7).

Life Below Water.reason: There is no information in the syllabus related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: The course content does not address terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍) directly promotes the rule of law and adherence to international agreements, aligning with Target 16.10.
